content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING TECHNOLOGY LINIVERSITY, ODISHA, GUNUPLR (GIET LINIVERSITY) OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. | 336 /GIETU/Exam/2025 Date: - 24/12/2025 NOTICE This is for information of the students concerned that, the subject registration for the Supplementary Examinations of the following courses will be held as per the schedule given below. 2023 - 2026 : by 26.12.2025 Rs. 400/- per and Subject. 27.12.2025 2023 - 2026 Students are advised to submit the filled in Back Paper Registration form along with > the Xerox Copy of the money receipt to their respective Head of the Department. » Application Received after the due date will not be considered. » The Supplementary Examinations will be held as per the Regular Examinations Schedule. ontroller of Examl tl Memo No: 13347 0US) f Date: 24.12.2025 Copy to: 1. The Vice-Chancellor/Registrar/ Dean Academics for information. 2. Dy. Dean-CSE/HoD - MBA/HoD -MCA/Coordinators of B.B.A. and BCA for information and necessary action. They are requested to inform the students about the date of subject registration for the supplementary Examination. 3. Accounts Section / Library / ERP / E-Class. 4. GIET University Website / Notice Board. @r GIET University
summary: | 336 /GIETU/Exam/2025 Date: - 24/12/2025 NOTICE This is for information of the students concerned that, the subject registration for the Supplementary Examinations of the following courses will be held as per the schedule given below. 27.12.2025 2023 - 2026 Students are advised to submit the filled in Back Paper Registration form along with > the Xerox Copy of the money receipt to their respective Head of the Department. They are requested to inform the students about the date of subject registration for the supplementary Examination.
